lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Corsair ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Corsair
sources.what: Ship overview: stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and shipyard availability.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Corsair lore, manufacturer, role profile, and design notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Positions the Corsair as a medium multirole, comparing its firepower and hold against the Python and Krait Mk II.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Corsair as a versatile medium, covering its hardpoints, internals and speed.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Full specifications overview: hardpoints, internals, cargo capacity, speed and launch date.
